title: Hunt
tmdbOverview: After a high-ranking North Korean official requests asylum, KCIA Foreign Unit chief Park Pyong-ho and Domestic Unit chief Kim Jung-do are tasked with uncovering a North Korean spy, known as Donglim, who is deeply embedded within their agency. When the spy begins leaking top secret intel that could jeopardize national security, the two units are each assigned to investigate each other.
synopsis: Released in 2022, Hunt is a action, mystery and drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a MA15+ certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
